mapper.select: SELECT e.id, e.year, e.title, e.summary, e.image_url FROM t_event_relation er INNER JOIN t_event e ON e.id = er.related_id WHERE er.event_id = #{eventId} ORDER BY er.sort_order DESC, e.year ASC LIMIT 3
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO t_event (title, year, month, day, summary, content, image_url, tags, source) VALUES
(#{event.title}, #{event.year}, #{event.month}, #{event.day}, #{event.summary}, #{event.content}, #{event.imageUrl}, #{event.tags}, #{event.source})
INSERT INTO t_event ( title, year, month, day, summary, content, image_url, tags, source ) VALUES ( #{title}, #{year}, #{month}, #{day}, #{summary}, #{content}, #{imageUrl}, #{tags}, #{source} )
INSERT IGNORE INTO t_event_relation (event_id, related_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{eventId}, #{relatedId}, #{sortOrder})
